landing.hero_desc: Collect, manage, and showcase customer reviews across every platform — powered by smart NFC cards, QR codes, and AI automation.
landing.problem_desc: 90% of customers read reviews before visiting a business. Yet most businesses have no strategy to collect, filter, or leverage them.
landing.problem_1_desc: Without a steady stream of fresh reviews, your business disappears from local search results and loses to competitors.
landing.problem_2_desc: One bad review can cost you 30 customers. Without a system to intercept unhappy feedback, damage is already done.
landing.problem_3_desc: Asking for reviews manually is inconsistent and ineffective. You need automated systems that work 24/7.
landing.system_desc: A proven 3-step process to dominate your local market.
landing.step_1_desc: Smart NFC cards and QR codes make it effortless for customers to leave reviews right after their experience.
landing.step_2_desc: Route satisfied customers to public review sites. Capture unhappy feedback privately before it goes public.
landing.step_3_desc: Watch your rating climb, your search ranking improve, and your revenue grow on autopilot.
landing.feature_1_desc: Automated SMS and email campaigns trigger at the perfect moment to maximize review collection.
landing.feature_2_desc: Intercept unhappy customers before they post publicly. Resolve issues privately and protect your brand.
landing.feature_3_desc: Track review volume, average rating, response rates, and competitive positioning in real time.
landing.feature_4_desc: Embed social proof on your website with conversion-optimized review display widgets.
landing.feature_5_desc: Create branded QR codes for receipts, packaging, and physical locations.
landing.feature_6_desc: Manage unlimited locations from a single dashboard with location-level analytics.
landing.command_center_desc: Everything you need in one powerful dashboard. Monitor, respond, and grow — all in real time.
landing.roi_disclaimer: Based on average results from businesses using Opinoor for 6+ months.
landing.cta_desc: Join thousands of businesses already using Opinoor to turn their reputation into their #1 growth engine.
agency.hero_desc: Our white-label platform makes it easy to manage multiple clients and generate recurring revenue.
agency.feature_desc_1: Rebrand the entire platform with your own logo, colors, and domain.
agency.feature_desc_2: Manage unlimited clients from a single dashboard.
agency.feature_desc_3: Generate recurring revenue by offering reputation management services.
agency.feature_desc_4: Get dedicated support from our team of experts.
agency.feature_desc_5: Give clients their own branded dashboard with your logo and domain.
agency.feature_desc_6: Manage all client billing from one place with consolidated invoicing.
agency.opportunity_desc: Charge clients $199-$499/month for reputation management. With just 10 clients at $299/month, you're generating $2,990/month in recurring revenue — for a net profit of $1,991/month. Scale to 50 clients and you're looking at $15K+/month in profit.
features.hero_desc: Every feature is designed to give you complete control over your online reputation. No fluff. Pure competitive advantage.
features.f1_desc: Trigger personalized SMS and email requests automatically after each customer interaction. Smart timing ensures maximum response rates.
features.f2_desc: Intercept unhappy customers before they leave a public review. Route negative feedback to private resolution channels.
features.f3_desc: Track every metric that matters — review volume, average rating, response rates, sentiment trends, and competitive positioning.
features.f4_desc: Embed conversion-optimized review widgets on your website. Showcase social proof exactly where buying decisions happen.
features.f5_desc: Create branded QR codes for physical locations, receipts, and packaging. Make leaving a review as simple as pointing a camera.
features.f6_desc: Manage unlimited locations from a single dashboard. Compare performance, identify weak spots, and scale what works.
features.f7_desc: Create automated drip sequences that nurture customers into advocates. Pre-built templates optimized for review generation.
features.f8_desc: Send high-conversion SMS requests with smart scheduling. 98% open rates mean your message gets seen.
features.f9_desc: Push reviews to Google, Yelp, Facebook, Trustpilot, and industry-specific platforms. Go where your customers are.
features.f10_desc: Get instant alerts for new reviews. Respond quickly to negative feedback before it spreads and damages your brand.
features.f11_desc: See exactly how your reputation impacts revenue. Connect the dots between reviews, traffic, and customer acquisition.
features.f12_desc: Agencies can rebrand the entire platform. Custom domain, custom branding, and unlimited client management.
contact.hero_desc: Ready to dominate your market? Get in touch and we'll show you how.
contact.placeholder_message: Tell us about your business and goals...
contact.book_demo_desc: See Opinoor in action with a personalized walkthrough.
faq.hero_desc: Find answers to common questions about Opinoor's platform, pricing, and features.
faq.no_results_desc: Try a different search term or category
faq.a1: Opinoor is a comprehensive reputation management platform that helps businesses monitor, collect, and respond to customer reviews across all major platforms — all from a single dashboard.
faq.q2: How does the review collection system work?
faq.a2: Our smart NFC cards and QR codes direct customers to leave reviews. The system uses intelligent routing to guide satisfied customers to public review sites while privately capturing feedback from less satisfied ones.
faq.q3: What platforms do you integrate with?
faq.a3: We integrate with Google Business, Trustpilot, Yelp, Facebook, TripAdvisor, and 50+ other review platforms. Custom integrations are available via our API.
faq.q4: Can I connect my existing CRM?
faq.a4: Yes. Opinoor integrates with major CRMs including Salesforce, HubSpot, and Pipedrive. We also offer webhooks and a REST API for custom integrations.
faq.a5: We offer Starter, Professional, and Enterprise plans. Each includes different levels of locations, API access, and features. Visit our pricing page for detailed comparisons.
faq.a6: Yes, we offer a 14-day free trial on all plans with no credit card required. You get full access to all features during the trial period.
faq.q7: Can I change my plan later?
faq.a7: Absolutely. You can upgrade or downgrade your plan at any time. Changes take effect at the start of your next billing cycle, with prorated adjustments.
faq.a8: Our AI assists with automated review response drafting, sentiment analysis, trend detection, and smart routing of customer feedback based on satisfaction scores.
faq.a9: Yes. Our platform is built for multi-location management with centralized dashboards, location-level analytics, and team access controls.
faq.q10: How do you handle data security?
faq.a10: We use enterprise-grade encryption (AES-256), SOC 2 compliant infrastructure, GDPR compliance, and regular security audits. All data is stored in ISO 27001 certified data centers.
faq.a11: Yes. We are fully GDPR compliant with data processing agreements, right to deletion support, and transparent data handling policies.
faq.a12: We offer email support, live chat, phone support (Business & Enterprise), and a comprehensive knowledge base. Enterprise plans include a dedicated account manager.
faq.a13: Yes. All plans include guided onboarding. Professional and Enterprise plans include dedicated onboarding sessions with a customer success manager.
faq.q14: What is the white-label agency program?
faq.a14: Our agency program lets you resell Opinoor under your own brand. You get custom branding, sub-account management, consolidated billing, and dedicated agency support.
